# Herbert Cuba Garcia

> Technology leader at the intersection of AI, strategy, and human potential. Author of The 3 Crucibles and The Digital Singularity Shift. Writes about agentic operating models, AI transformation, and the organizational shifts required when agents become first-class actors.

## Insights

- [All insights](https://www.cubagarcia.com/insights/)
- [APEX — Agentic Production Execution](https://www.cubagarcia.com/posts/2026-04-05-apex-framework/)
